scripts.build:docs: bun --bun run build:packages && bun --bun run codegen && bun --bun run build:backend && bun --bun run --filter=@stackframe/stack-docs generate-openapi-docs && turbo run build --filter=@stackframe/stack-docs
scripts.clean: bun --bun pre-no-codegen && turbo run clean && rimraf --glob **/.next && rimraf --glob **/.turbo && rimraf .turbo && rimraf --glob **/node_modules && rimraf node_modules
scripts.uff-cutie: bun --bun clean && bun --bun i && (bun --bun build || true) && bun --bun codegen
scripts.codegen: turbo run codegen && bun --bun run generate-sdks
scripts.stop-deps: POSTGRES_DELAY_MS=0 bun --bun run deps-compose kill && POSTGRES_DELAY_MS=0 bun --bun run deps-compose down -v
scripts.wait-until-postgres-is-ready:pg_isready: until pg_isready -h localhost -p ${NEXT_PUBLIC_STACK_PORT_PREFIX:-81}28 && pg_isready -h localhost -p ${NEXT_PUBLIC_STACK_PORT_PREFIX:-81}34; do sleep 1; done
scripts.wait-until-postgres-is-ready: command -v pg_isready >/dev/null 2>&1 && bun --bun run wait-until-postgres-is-ready:pg_isready || sleep 10  # not everyone has pg_isready installed, so we fallback to sleeping
scripts.start-deps:no-delay: bun --bun run deps-compose up --detach --build && bun --bun run wait-until-postgres-is-ready && bun --bun run wait-until-clickhouse-is-ready && bun --bun run db:init && echo "\nDependencies started in the background as Docker containers. 'bun --bun run stop-deps' to stop them"n
scripts.restart-deps: bun --bun run stop-deps && bun --bun run start-deps
scripts.restart-deps:no-delay: bun --bun run stop-deps && bun --bun run start-deps:no-delay
scripts.restart-deps:with-tests: bun --bun run restart-deps && bun --bun test run auto-migrations/migration-tests
scripts.explain-query:
echo 'Paste your query (end with Ctrl-D):' && query=$(cat) && echo 'Connecting to Postgres...' && printf "EXPLAIN (ANALYZE, COSTS, VERBOSE, BUFFERS, FORMAT JSON)
$query" | bun --bun run --silent psql -qAt | sed -n '/\[/,$p' > explained-query.untracked.json && echo 'Explained query saved to explained-query.untracked.json. To analyze it, open it in the query analyzer at https://tatiyants.com/pev/#/plans/new'
scripts.dev: concurrently -k "bun --bun run generate-sdks:watch" "bun --bun run generate-openapi-docs:watch" "turbo run dev --concurrency 99999 --filter=./apps/* --filter=@stackframe/docs-mintlify --filter=@stackframe/stack-docs --filter=./packages/* --filter=./examples/demo "
scripts.dev:tui: (trap 'kill 0' EXIT; bun --bun run generate-sdks:watch & bun --bun run generate-openapi-docs:watch & turbo run dev --ui tui --concurrency 99999 --filter=./apps/* --filter=@stackframe/stack-docs --filter=./packages/* --filter=./examples/demo)
scripts.kill-dev:named: (pgrep -f 'stack-named-dev-server' | xargs -r -n1 pkill -P); echo 'Killed named dev server (if found). Sleeping to give some time for it to shut down...' && sleep 10
scripts.kms: PREFIX=${NEXT_PUBLIC_STACK_PORT_PREFIX:-81}; for p in 00 01 02 03 04 06 14; do pids=$(lsof -i :$PREFIX$p 2>/dev/null | grep LISTEN | awk '$1 != "OrbStack" {print $2}' | sort -u); [ -n "$pids" ] && echo $pids | xargs kill -9 2>/dev/null; done; echo Done.
